name: Generalised Bellman recurrence and three dualities in sequential decision-making

description: arXiv:2607.18077v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: What gives the Bellman equation its form? We show that the recursive properties of optimal value functions follow from three conditions: that the dynamics decomposes through sufficient statistics, that the return decomposes recursively, and that the aggregation of uncertainty is compatible with both. When all three conditions hold on a common st...
author: Fernando E. Rosas, David Hyland, Daniel Polani
